description: Microsoft Security Response Center publishes a Critical (CVSS 9.8) advisory for a Microsoft product Alex owns on Patch Tuesday. Phase E enrichment publishes an enrichment.msrc.critical signal → vulnerability-to-change fires and the change-manager drafts an RFC. Outcome probe checks for an RFC + MSRC citation.

payload.title: Microsoft Management Console Remote Code Execution Vulnerability

steps.description: vulnerability-to-change received the MSRC critical signal

expectedOutcomes: change-manager drafts an RFC with the MSRC + CVE citation in the worknote
outcome verifier MSRC probe inspects the run for an RFC create + MSRC citation
